testing_centers.notes: Online proctored exams via Examity. Schedule at certification.okta.com. Requires a one-time Examity profile setup.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Online proctored via Examity: must be alone in room, no second monitors, no virtual machines or remote desktop. All candidates must accept the Okta Certification Program Agreement before taking any exam. OCTA is a board defense exam format, not a multiple-choice exam.
renewal_options: Certifications are valid for 2 years. Maintenance exams cost $100 USD (first attempt), $0 (second), alternating. Individuals who earn OCTA receive a 1-year extension on all their lower-level certs. Renew at certification.okta.com.

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period between failed attempts. Retake price is $100 USD per attempt (vs. $250 for first attempt). OCTA retake is $2,500 USD. Missing or canceling appointments can forfeit attempts.

official_study_resources.title: Okta Certification Exam Preparation Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Free study guides available per certification at certification.okta.com

official_study_resources.title: Okta Premier Practice Exam
official_study_resources.notes: $75 USD for 7 attempts; additional $75 per subsequent set of 7 attempts
